metadata.title: Shai Tamam | Medical Information & Research Consultant
metadata.description: Medical information consulting, systematic reviews, knowledge management, and AI integration for research — over 10 years of experience

hero.name: Shai Tamam
hero.title: Medical Information & Research Consultant
hero.tagline: Helping researchers, graduate students, and organizations navigate the world of medical information — from systematic reviews to AI-powered research workflows

about.heading: About
about.paragraph1: Senior Information Specialist with over 10 years of experience in academic libraries and the HealthTech industry. Skilled in literature reviews, knowledge management, and training development, with a clinical background as a licensed paramedic.
about.paragraph2: Throughout my career, I've collaborated with clinical research teams, developed AI-powered systems for literature screening and signal detection, and built knowledge repositories integrating regulatory and scientific databases.

services.heading: Services
services.subtitle: Professional consulting and support for researchers, students, and organizations

systematicReviews.title: Systematic & Literature Reviews
systematicReviews.description: Comprehensive evidence synthesis, systematic search strategies, PRISMA-compliant reviews, and scoping reviews.

knowledgeManagement.title: Knowledge Management
knowledgeManagement.description: Building knowledge repositories, database consolidation, information architecture, and work with regulatory databases (FDA, FAERS, WHO VigiAccess).

learningDevelopment.title: Learning & Instructional Design
learningDevelopment.description: LMS administration (Moodle), e-learning course development (Articulate Storyline), training programs, and workshops.

medicalAI.title: Medical Information & AI
medicalAI.description: AI-powered workflows for literature screening, signal detection, combining rule-based filtering with LLM analysis for clinical data extraction.

researchConsultation.title: Research Consultation
researchConsultation.description: Supporting evidence-based clinical and professional decision-making, research strategy, and evidence appraisal.

training.title: Training & Workshops
training.description: Training researchers and students in medical database searching (PubMed, Cochrane, Embase) and using AI tools for research.

scientificWriting.title: Scientific Writing Support
scientificWriting.description: Assistance with writing the methods section in medical research, including search strategy description, inclusion/exclusion criteria, and review process.

aiIntegration.title: AI Integration for Research
aiIntegration.description: Consulting for organizations and researchers on integrating AI tools into research workflows — from literature search to data analysis.

mdi.title: Medical Information Specialist
mdi.description: Worked within R&D on knowledge management and AI integration, collaborating with clinical, product, and development teams.

tau.title: Head of Training & Reference Unit
tau.company: Tel Aviv University, Life Sciences & Medicine Library
tau.description: Managed a team of 4 information specialists, transitioned to Moodle platform, developed content with Articulate Storyline.

bgu.title: Medical Librarian & Systematic Reviews Lead
bgu.description: Established systematic review service, co-authored 4 peer-reviewed publications, developed training for students and staff.

intel.title: Paramedic Team Leader
intel.description: Led a team of ~10 paramedics, set up knowledge management system in SharePoint, wrote emergency protocols.

publications.heading: Publications
publications.subtitle: 4 peer-reviewed articles published on PubMed as methodological contributor
publications.pub1Title: GH treatment in pediatric Down syndrome: a systematic review and mini meta-analysis
publications.pub2Title: GHRH-GH-IGF1 axis in pediatric Down syndrome: a systematic review and mini meta-analysis
publications.pub3Title: The association between overactive bladder and fibromyalgia: a systematic review and meta-analysis
publications.pub4Title: A systematic review of stem cell therapy treatment for women suffering from stress urinary incontinence

contact.heading: Contact
contact.subtitle: Feel free to reach out for a free initial consultation
contact.success: Message sent successfully! I'll get back to you soon.
contact.error: An error occurred. Please try again or contact me directly via email.
